name: Sprint 10 (unofficial)
note: Date-range release covering May 5 - May 15, 2026 (11 calendar days). Jira is not used as the source of truth for sprint planning at BrightHive — GitHub PRs are. Headline themes: AgentCore migration epic landed (BH-453 + 23 child tickets), BrightStudio Hive/Governance/Navigation IA, BrightSignals unified drawer, dbt multi-repo + Secrets Manager credential storage, scheduler hardening, production hotfixes.
goals: AgentCore migration epic — write spec v2 (incorporating 4-agent review) + create 23-ticket child plan in Jira for visibility
BrightStudio webapp IA — navigation restructure, The Hive, Governance section, Notifications Inbox
BrightSignals — unified activity drawer (BH-409 notification spec follow-through)
dbt multi-repo support + Secrets Manager credential storage
Scheduler MVP webhook hardening (carryover from Sprint 9)
Production stability — hotfixes for Mem0/S3 streaming, project retrieval, AG Grid
Sprint 9 close + Bedrock migration diary catch-up (Weeks 6-11)
themes: AgentCore migration spec v2 + 23-ticket epic (BH-453 family)
BrightStudio webapp navigation IA + The Hive + Governance sections
BrightSignals unified activity drawer + Notifications Inbox UX
dbt multi-repo preview + Secrets Manager credential storage
Scheduler webhook hardening — task graph, payloads, state, langgraph webhook
Production hotfixes — Mem0/S3 streaming, project retrieval, AG Grid sidebar layout, duplicate data assets
Sprint 9 close + Bedrock migration diary catch-up (Weeks 6-11)
Local-dev quality_check stack with Postgres + LocalStack
release_highlights: 5/12 brightbot Staging → Production (#480, +27785 lines) — fast detect-rollback-redeploy cycle (#481 revert, #482 re-apply within 24h). Healthy production muscle in action.
5/15 same-day hotfix (#483) for brightagent S3 streaming + Mem0 — tight detect-and-fix feedback loop.
Scheduler MVP webhook hardening x4 (brightbot #463, #469, #472, #474, platform-core #759) — iterative production firming, foundation for Sprint 11 Scheduler v1 (retry + cron + audit).
